caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Grand Cayman
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 16 kt and wave heights of 7.0 ft, while Roatan is seeing winds of 23 kt. I expect the strong winds and high rain probability to impact cruise ship operations in the Western Caribbean, particularly in ports such as Grand Cayman and Roatan.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 22 kt winds with 4.5 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Venice has 0 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with Cadiz being the top impact port in the Mediterranean due to the moderate winds and wave heights.
